memberdef.argsstring: (self, WorldInstanceTypes world_instance_type, World world, int fps=30)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim: Getter for the number of ticks.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, dict[int, object] entity_action_map, dict[str, float] statistics)
memberdef.name: set_entity_action_map

para.verbatim: Process the actions received from the neural network for each entity.
To update the world and get creatures perceptions.

Run get_perception_responses in the dedicated thread pool.
Returns the encoded state bytes and updates self.last_state_response.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, EntityInterface entity_interface, int|None hovered_entity, int|None selected_entity)
memberdef.name: make_entity_take_item

memberdef.argsstring: (self, int timestamp, float value, str series_name="performance_metrics")
memberdef.name: put_time_series

para.verbatim:
Record a time series value in the C++ world database.
Args: timestamp: Unix timestamp value: The value to record series_name: Name of the time series (default: "performance_metrics")

memberdef.argsstring: (self, int start, int end, str series_name="performance_metrics")
memberdef.name: query_time_series

para.verbatim:
Query time series data from the C++ world database. Returns a list of (timestamp, value) pairs.
Args: start: Start timestamp end: End timestamp series_name: Name of the time series to query (default: "performance_metrics")
Execute a raw SQL command in the C++ world database.
Manages different ways to instantiate and manage a world instance.
